pi_items.source: Contradicted by the task description, which explicitly asks to register a "physician". The phrase "Occupational Health and Safety Technician" is completely absent from the instructions.
Contradicted by the task description and verification scripts. This field is completely fabricated and absent from the task definition.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a synthetic health professional record in the GNU Health Demo Database. The required parameters (First name "Maria", Last name "Santos", and Professional License "MED20247891") are explicitly verified against the task description and verifier logic. However, the metadata claims regarding occupation ("Occupational Health and Safety Technician") and industry ("Life, Physical, and Social Science") are completely fabricated; the task explicitly asks to register a "physician", and the GNU Health schema and task instructions do not contain or evaluate these fields.
